text: All comparables have been found on the westside of Bloomington, IL and were selected to demonstrate the marketability of recently updated homes of a similar location, design, age, quality, and condition. Due to recent market trends the comparables have received a market time adjustment of 6.7% based on the sales statistics chart included in this report. Comparable #1 has been adjusted for its age, GLA, lack of a basement, lack of a deck, and lack of a fence. Comparable #2 has been adjusted for its age, basement finished room count, garage space count, and lack of a deck. Comparable #3 has been adjusted for its age and garage space count. See Comparable #4.
